data.name: MaterialsError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during material operation.

data.name: MaterialsError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Materials.

data.name: RequisitionError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during requisition operation.

data.name: RequisitionError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Requisition.

data.name: RequisitionError.ProjectReferenceNotFound
data.value: The project referenced by the requisition was not found.
